summary: Phase 3 Sprint 4 - Hotel & B2B Dashboard Rollout testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend APIs /api/dashboard/hotel-today and /api/dashboard/b2b-today return valid JSON with all required keys. Hotel Dashboard UI at /app/hotel/dashboard shows all 5 blocks. B2B Dashboard UI at /b2b/dashboard shows all 5 blocks. Command Palette (Cmd+K) shows persona-based navigation: admin sees 115 pages, agency sees 20 pages. directAccessOnly items show 'gizli' badge. DashboardRouter correctly routes admin->AdminDashboardPage, agency->AgencyDashboardPage, hotel->HotelDashboardPage.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend API /api/dashboard/hotel-today correctly returns {ok, data, meta} envelope with all 7 required fields: checkin_checkout, occupancy, alerts, pending, revenue, upcoming_arrivals, recent_activity
Backend API /api/dashboard/b2b-today correctly returns {ok, data, meta} envelope with all 7 required fields: pipeline, partners, pending, revenue, recent_bookings, recent_activity, announcements
CommandPalette.jsx correctly uses persona-based navigation from navigation/ module via flattenNavItems()
Admin persona sees 115 searchable pages, Agency persona sees 20 searchable pages
directAccessOnly items correctly show 'gizli' badge in Command Palette
HotelDashboardPage.jsx has all 5 blocks with proper data-testid attributes
B2BDashboardPage.jsx has all 5 blocks with proper data-testid attributes
B2BLayout.jsx has 'Ana Panel' nav link pointing to /b2b/dashboard
hotelRoutes.jsx has dashboard route with index redirect to dashboard
DashboardRouter in coreRoutes.jsx correctly routes: admin->AdminDashboardPage, agency->AgencyDashboardPage, hotel->HotelDashboardPage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Sprint 4 Hotel & B2B Dashboard complete. Hotel Dashboard at /app/hotel/dashboard shows 5 blocks: check-in/out KPI, occupancy, alerts, pending, arrivals + activity. B2B Dashboard at /b2b/dashboard shows 5 blocks: pipeline, partners, pending, revenue, bookings + activity. Command Palette (Cmd+K) uses persona-based navigation: admin ~115 pages, agency ~20 pages. DashboardRouter routes: admin->AdminDashboardPage, agency->AgencyDashboardPage, hotel->HotelDashboardPage.

features_verified.backend_api_hotel_today: PASSED - GET /api/dashboard/hotel-today returns valid JSON with checkin_checkout, occupancy, alerts, pending, revenue, upcoming_arrivals, recent_activity
features_verified.backend_api_b2b_today: PASSED - GET /api/dashboard/b2b-today returns valid JSON with pipeline, partners, pending, revenue, recent_bookings, recent_activity, announcements
features_verified.hotel_dashboard_ui: PASSED - /app/hotel/dashboard shows 'Otel Kontrol Paneli' with all 5 blocks
features_verified.b2b_dashboard_ui: PASSED - /b2b/dashboard shows 'B2B Kontrol Paneli' with all 5 blocks
features_verified.b2b_layout_ana_panel_link: PASSED - B2BLayout has 'Ana Panel' nav link to /b2b/dashboard
features_verified.dashboard_router_admin: PASSED - Admin routed to AdminDashboardPage at /app
features_verified.dashboard_router_agency: PASSED - Agency routed to AgencyDashboardPage at /app
features_verified.dashboard_router_hotel: PASSED - Hotel persona routed to HotelDashboardPage

console_observations: 400 errors on /api/reports/reservations-summary and /api/reports/sales-summary (tenant_context_missing) - pre-existing issue, not related to Sprint 4
React Router Future Flag Warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) - informational
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent in Command Palette - minor accessibility warning
